name: U.S. Bank Deposit Estate Tax Exclusion

eligibility.description: Nonresident non-citizens holding deposits with U.S. banking institutions or foreign branches of U.S. banks, provided interest is not effectively connected to a U.S. trade or business.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Certain bank deposits and debt obligations generating portfolio interest are excluded from the U.S. gross estate for nonresident non-citizens.
